items.summary: Debug and fix the OTP login flow end-to-end: verify that clicking Send OTP triggers the backend sendOTP method, displays appropriate loading state, and shows the OTP verification screen upon success

Verify OTP verification flow: ensure that entering a valid 6-digit OTP and clicking Verify & Login calls the backend verifyOTP method, authenticates the user, and redirects to the dashboard for existing users

Verify new user signup flow: ensure that after successful OTP verification for a new mobile number, the signup form appears with Full Name and Class/Course fields, and submitting creates the user profile and redirects to dashboard
Ensure useOTPAuth hook properly integrates with backend actor methods (sendOTP and verifyOTP) and maintains authentication state across page refreshes using localStorage
Verify backend sendOTP method generates a 6-digit OTP for the provided mobile number, stores it with a 5-minute expiration timestamp, and returns success status

Verify backend verifyOTP method validates the provided OTP against stored data, checks expiration, determines if the mobile number is a new or existing user, and returns appropriate authentication status with user information
